subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from this Youth unto all that dwell upon the earth, that they shall worship none but God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا الغلام الی من علی الارض اجمعین ان لاتعبدوا الا اله
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
